description: Trigger and behavior cases for the AI router layer: call-site consolidation, server-side-only credentials, task/cost routing, choke-point cost enforcement, resilient fallback, kill switch, idempotent retries; manual-only because it wires live providers.

cases.prompt: We call OpenAI and Anthropic directly from about 20 places in the code. Design a proper routing layer so we have one place for keys, cost tracking, and fallback.

assertions: Designs a single internal interface all call sites route through and locks credentials server-side only with a client-bundle-absence proof.
Routes by task/cost/latency/availability deterministically and enforces cost/rate/concurrency limits at the choke point, failing safe.
Specifies resilient failure handling (bounded idempotent-only retries, provider fallback surfaced in telemetry, circuit breaker) and a no-deploy kill switch.
Notes the skill is manual-only because it wires live providers/credentials and hands the change over as a proposed diff.

cases.prompt: Add retries to our AI router. Some of the routed calls also trigger a tool that sends a customer email.

assertions: Restricts automatic retries to idempotent/safe calls and requires an idempotency key for side-effecting calls so a retry can't send the email twice.
Surfaces fallback usage in telemetry to avoid silent quality/cost downgrade.
Composes api-event-architect for the idempotency pattern rather than re-deriving it.

cases.prompt: Decide our per-tenant token budgets and rate limits and how we defend against denial-of-wallet.

assertions: Defining the budget/quota/denial-of-wallet POLICY is ai-cost-guardrail-designer; this skill enforces that policy at the router choke point but doesn't set the numbers.

cases.prompt: To avoid a backend hop, just call the model provider directly from the browser with our API key in a public env var — design that routing.

assertions: Refuses the client-side key design: a provider key reachable from the browser bundle ships to every user and is a critical finding.
Requires server-side-only custody with a proxy for any browser streaming, composing secrets-identity-hardener for the proof and rotation.
States the residual risk and that the credential exposure must be remediated before shipping.
